de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class ParseExceptionInFile

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Throwable
      • java.lang.Exception
        • recoder.ParserException
          • recoder.parser.ParseException
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ParseExceptionInFile
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    HasLocation, java.io.Serializable

    public class ParseExceptionInFile
extends ParseException
implements HasLocation
    This exception extends recoder's ParseException by a filename.

    The filename is used to display the location of an error in the sources. Line and column number are not stored here explicitly but retrieved from the cause.

    See Also:
    Serialized Form

      • getFilename

      • getLocation

        @Nullable
public Location getLocation()
                               throws java.net.MalformedURLException
        Description copied from interface: HasLocation
        This method can be used to obtain the Location (1-based line and column!) of the exception.
        Specified by:
        getLocation in interface HasLocation
        Returns:
        the location of the exception
        Throws:
        java.net.MalformedURLException - if the URL for the location can not be created
